productDisplayName: Nike Men's Zoom Structure White Shoe
description: Step out and run in absolute style in nike Zoom Structure+ 14 running shoes. Replete with nike Zoom units that offer ultimate cushioning, this shoe also offers superior Fit, traction and stability that alow you to run for miles in style. Featuring a Nike+ Ready option, this shoe can be teamed with Nike+ compatible iPods, Stop watches and much more to clock your fitness regime.Upper Breathable mesh upper with nearly seamless construction for ample ventilation and reduced irritation Inner bootie that wraps around the foot offering exceptional comfort Extended Flywire panels for lightweight comfort, super strong support and more secure fit around the midfoot Symmetrical lace-up system for a snug fit Meshed and padded tongue and sockliner for in-step comfort Midsole Phylon midsole with Nike Zoom unit in the heel for ultra-lightweight, springy cushioning, soft responsive shock absorption and superior fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Environmentally preferred rubber outsole for enhanced durability BRS 1000 Carbon rubber under the heel for abrasion resistance Waffle pattern for maximum traction, with a scooped heel for extra cushioning Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
